description: The Aston Martin DBS, produced from 2007 to 2012, was the range-topping grand tourer based on the DB9 platform. Its naturally aspirated 6.0-litre V12 produced 510 bhp and was paired with a six-speed manual or Touchtronic automatic. The carbon-fibre-bodied DBS was notably the Bond car in Casino Royale and Quantum of Solace.
